headline: Tesla Robotaxi Hubs Highlight Autonomy Potential As Australian Scrutiny Builds
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has started building dedicated robotaxi maintenance hubs, preparing for large scale autonomous ride hailing operations. At the same time, Tesla is facing rising legal and regulatory scrutiny in Australia over alleged misleading claims about vehicle safety and self driving features. Tesla, best known for its electric vehicles and energy products, is now moving further into autonomous mobility with these new robotaxi maintenance hubs. This shift takes the story...
